title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for downloading, building and running LLMs locally with a lightweight, extensible server.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama server; pip-installable wrapper around the REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; published to npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLMs or embeddings in any LangChain pipeline.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (now ‘Open WebUI’) that talks to a local Ollama instance; supports RAG, multi-user, themes.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library exposing Ollama endpoints with async, streaming and model-management helpers.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby objects and streaming support.

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Interactive TUI for chatting with Ollama models, written in Go with bubbletea; supports markdown & conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset, allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes and mini-projects showing how to combine Ollama with FastAPI, Discord bots, Home-Assistant, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and optional WebUI sidecar.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (cpu/cuda/rocm) and one-liner docker-run commands maintained in the main repo.

title: ollama-workflows
summary: GitHub Actions examples that cache models and run CI checks using Ollama for unit-test generation or doc QA.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde types.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library that wraps Ollama endpoints in idiomatic C# with async enumerable streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger.io module example showing how to spin up Ollama in a pipeline for local LLM-based code review or doc generation.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Chat with note” command using any Ollama model for local AI assistance inside your vault.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Curated list maintained in the main repo pointing to all official and community SDKs (Go, Python, JS, Java, Rust, C#, Ruby, Dart, etc.).

title: ollama-reddit discussion
summary: Reddit thread announcing Ollama v0.1.10 with beta tool-use / function-calling support and community examples.
